title: AXModalRef
description: Reference object returned when opening a modal that provides methods to control the modal's behavior and state.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Modal reference interface with control methods.

types.title: AXModalRef
types.description: Reference object for controlling modal behavior

props.name: onClose
props.description: Observable that emits when the modal is closed, with optional result data.

methods.content:
/**
 * Minimizes the modal to the bottom bar.
 */
minimize(): void

/**
 * Maximizes the modal to fullscreen.
 */
maximize(): void

/**
 * Restores the modal from minimized or maximized state.
 */
restore(): void

/**
 * Closes the modal with optional result data.
 * @param data - Optional data to pass to the close event
 */
close(data?: TResult): void

/**
 * Sets input values for the modal content component.
 * @param values - Object containing input values to set
 */
setInputs(values: AXComponentInputs): void
